_about: Real Google Ads campaigns-table row innerText captured on 2026-05-13 from ads.google.com/aw/campaigns (MVP MCC parent, workspaceId=-638109893). Each entry in `rows` is the `innerText` of one `div[role="row"]` after `.replace(/\n+/g, '|')` — the same shape the JS scraper at state-x0a-scrape-ga-clicks.md feeds into `parts.split('|')` for position-decoding. Test `test_parse_ga_row_text_against_fixture` asserts the Python parser at iterate_cross_ga.py decodes these correctly. When Google Ads UI changes (column order, new column, removed column), the test fails BEFORE the operator runs /iterate --cross.
